title: NVR Q3 Earnings Beat, Homebuilding Revenues Miss, Margin Up
text: NVR's third-quarter 2023 results are hurt by low contributions from the Homebuilding segment due to softened housing demand and macroeconomic woes.

title: NVR, INC. ANNOUNCES THIRD QUARTER RESULTS
text: RESTON, Va. , Oct. 24, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- NVR, Inc. (NYSE: NVR), one of the nation's largest homebuilding and mortgage banking companies, announced net income for its third quarter ended September 30, 2023 of $433.2 million, or $125.26 per diluted share.

title: NVR Update: Gold-Rich VMS and Porphyry Style Deposit Potential Identified at Comstock Property; Drill Targets Refined at Historic Comstock Original-Diane Zone
text: Kamloops, British Columbia--(Newsfile Corp. - October 24, 2023) - North Valley Resources Ltd. (CSE: NVR) ("North Valley" or "the Company") is pleased to share findings from its first comprehensive high-resolution airborne magnetic and radiometric survey on its Comstock property ("Comstock" or "the Property").

title: LEN or NVR: Which Is the Better Value Stock Right Now?
text: Investors with an interest in Building Products - Home Builders stocks have likely encountered both Lennar (LEN) and NVR (NVR). But which of these two stocks is more attractive to value investors?

title: Could This Brand-New Warren Buffett Stock Be the Next Stock-Split Stock?
text: NVR now trades at a price above $5,000 per share. The homebuilder has a long track record of beating the S&P 500.

title: Housing Starts Up, Homebuilders Down as Mortgage Rates Soar
text: Homebuilders as a group were trading lower following the U.S. Census Bureau's report that more single-family homes were built in September than in August.

title: Housing ETFs Up 20%+ YTD: Here's Why More Rally is Likely
text: A resurgence of optimism has been seen in the homebuilder's market this year with SPDR S&P Homebuilders ETF XHB and iShares US Home Construction ETF ITB adding more than 23% and 26% so far (as of Oct 2, 2023). These funds underperformed last year, which helped the duo rally hard this year amid favorable operating environment.

title: Three reasons investors have fallen in love with home builders' stocks
text: At a time when mortgage loan rates have soared to their highest levels since 2000, it might surprise you that some analysts think this is a good time to buy shares of large home builders. But there are a number of good reasons for long-term investors to consider buying home builders' stocks now, as outlined by Oppenheimer & Co. analysts Tyler Batory and Jonathan Jenkins in a note to clients on Thursday.

title: TOL or NVR: Which Is the Better Value Stock Right Now?
text: Investors with an interest in Building Products - Home Builders stocks have likely encountered both Toll Brothers (TOL) and NVR (NVR). But which of these two stocks offers value investors a better bang for their buck right now?

title: 4 Homebuilding Stocks to Buy on Rise in Construction Spending
text: Construction spending is steadily rebounding to normal, aided by investments in housing projects, which is helping stocks like Toll Brothers Inc. (TOL), M.D.C. Holdings, Inc. (MDC), NVR, Inc. (NVR) and PulteGroup (PHM).

title: NVR: Controlled Risk With Potential Upside
text: NVR's unique business model benefits from the upside in an inflationary environment while protecting the downside in a recession. The company is enjoying some tailwinds from a shortage in the housing market in the U.S. Through the whole cycle, NVR's average return on capital employed is at 24% and is improving.

title: Housing Market Crash 2024: Did Warren Buffett Read the Signals Wrong?
text: People seem to be worried about a housing market crash. Warren Buffett isn't one of them.
